title: Report on place of potential cultural significance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Report on place of potential cultural significance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate evidence of previous culturally significant activities

pcs.text: Manage movement through park or cultural site to minimise disturbance and degradation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage movement through park or cultural site to minimise disturbance and degradation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage movement through park or cultural site to minimise disturbance and degradation.

pcs.text: Comply with local Community protocols, legislative requirements, Codes of Practice and the cultural site management strategy and plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with local Community protocols, legislative requirements, Codes of Practice and the cultural site management strategy and plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with local Community protocols, legislative requirements, Codes of Practice and the cultural site management strategy and plan.

pcs.text: Survey an area for landforms and waterways that may have cultural or natural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey an area for landforms and waterways that may have cultural or natural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey an area for landforms and waterways that may have cultural or natural significance.

pcs.text: Record and document any signs of culturally significant Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and document any signs of culturally significant Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and document any signs of culturally significant Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activity.

pcs.text: Review activities in area of potential cultural significance, and maintain, modify or halt activities to maintain significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review activities in area of potential cultural significance, and maintain, modify or halt activities to maintain significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review activities in area of potential cultural significance, and maintain, modify or halt activities to maintain significance.

pcs.text: Record the impact of the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activities at the culturally significant site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the impact of the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activities at the culturally significant site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the impact of the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander activities at the culturally significant site.

pcs.text: Seek advice from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander stakeholders or Cultural Authorities about the culturally significant site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander stakeholders or Cultural Authorities about the culturally significant site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander stakeholders or Cultural Authorities about the culturally significant site.

pcs.text: Record field notes of location in terms of area features, survey markers or global positioning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record field notes of location in terms of area features, survey markers or global positioning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record field notes of location in terms of area features, survey markers or global positioning.

pcs.text: Document reasons for identifying potential significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document reasons for identifying potential significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document reasons for identifying potential significance.

pcs.text: Refer location to stakeholders or Cultural Authorities for further directions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer location to stakeholders or Cultural Authorities for further directions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer location to stakeholders or Cultural Authorities for further directions.

pcs.text: Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Investigate evidence of previous culturally significant activities

elements.title: Implement interim protection measures

pcs.text: Identify and record immediate and longer-term threats or risks associated with the conservation of the place according to organisation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record immediate and longer-term threats or risks associated with the conservation of the place according to organisation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record immediate and longer-term threats or risks associated with the conservation of the place according to organisation requirements.

pcs.text: Take interim protective measures to avoid degradation, disturbance and deterioration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take interim protective measures to avoid degradation, disturbance and deterioration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take interim protective measures to avoid degradation, disturbance and deterioration.

pcs.text: Modify existing activities of personnel and visitors to reduce or eliminate risks to the significance of the place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify existing activities of personnel and visitors to reduce or eliminate risks to the significance of the place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify existing activities of personnel and visitors to reduce or eliminate risks to the significance of the place.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement interim protection measures

elements.title: Report observation

pcs.text: Collate and record field notes on location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and record field notes on location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and record field notes on location.

pcs.text: Review organisational records to reveal any existing information about the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander significance of the place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review organisational records to reveal any existing information about the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander significance of the place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review organisational records to reveal any existing information about the non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander significance of the place.

pcs.text: Report finding and interim protective measures to colleagues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report finding and interim protective measures to colleagues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report finding and interim protective measures to colleagues.

pcs.text: Seek advice on the potential cultural and natural significance of the place and any additional required protective measures from stakeholders or cultural reference group, from specialists in or external to the organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice on the potential cultural and natural significance of the place and any additional required protective measures from stakeholders or cultural reference group, from specialists in or external to the organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice on the potential cultural and natural significance of the place and any additional required protective measures from stakeholders or cultural reference group, from specialists in or external to the organisation.

pcs.text: Document and report interim assessment of place according to legislative requirements, best practice guidelines and Codes of Practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and report interim assessment of place according to legislative requirements, best practice guidelines and Codes of Practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report interim assessment of place according to legislative requirements, best practice guidelines and Codes of Practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Report observation

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
